steps.title: Identify the timeline contrast
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that Museo de las Américas was founded in 1991 and LA Plaza de Cultura y Artes opened in 2011. This is the only specific, factual contrast the text draws between the two institutions.

steps.title: Match the timeline to the answer choices
steps.content: LA Plaza opened more recently than Museo based on the dates provided in the passage. The other choices all reference information not mentioned in the text. D is correct.
